mood: Impenetrable, secure, fast, and technical. The UI should fade away to prioritize the chat, but structural borders should feel rigid and safe.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing for the landing page to build trust. Extremely dense, Control Room Grid spacing for the actual messaging app.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid), gap-8 to gap-12, asymmetrical.
spacing_and_layout.app_layout: Control Room Grid. 100vh height. 4-column layout: Servers (72px), Channels (240px), Main Chat (Flex), Right Sidebar/Profile (240px).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). 1px solid border-white/10 to separate columns and rows. Max border radius 8px (rounded-md).

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI components, customized to be visually flat and sharp.
components.buttons: Square edges or slight radius. High contrast (bg-white text-black). Hover: bg-gray-200. Accent buttons for E2EE verify: bg-[#00FF66] text-black.
components.inputs: bg-transparent border border-white/20 focus:border-[#00FF66] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FF66].
components.chat_bubbles: Flat, cardless look. Sent by user: bg-white/10 text-white. Received: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-gray-300.
components.modals: Crystal Glassmorphism for security overlays (like 2FA setup): bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10.

motion.chat_entrance: opacity 0 to 1, translate-y 10 to 0. Fast 200ms ease-out.

hero_background.description: Rows of dark cubes with glowing green lines. Use for landing page hero or auth screen background.

feature_encryption.description: Golden fiber optic lights against a black background. Use for End-to-End Encryption features section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React (Frontend) and FastAPI (Backend) application using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Implement the landing page highlighting End-to-End Encryption (E2EE), using the provided geometric tech backgrounds.
Implement the main messaging application with a Discord/Teams style layout (Servers Sidebar -> Channels -> Chat -> Details).
Use a strict 1px grid border layout (border-white/10) for the app UI to expose the structural skeleton and separate the sidebars and chat area clearly.
Ensure high contrast text (WCAG AA). NEVER use pure #000000; use #0A0A0A.
Use 'IBM Plex Mono' for all encryption keys, JWT tokens, UUIDs, and security fingerprints.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, servers, channels).
Implement the profile settings page to explicitly show the public encryption key.
